entities.name: DEBUG/VERBOSE flag
entities.context: Code flag that when enabled triggers escalation for confirmation

entities.name: Debug statements
entities.context: Code statements used for debugging; >20 may indicate logging strategy issues

entities.name: Logging strategy
entities.context: Approach to application logging; potential issue when excessive debug statements present

entities.name: Unused variable
entities.context: Variable in function signature that goes unused; signals interface issue

entities.name: Function signature
entities.context: Interface definition for functions; unused variables here warrant escalation

entities.name: TODO marker
entities.context: Code comment marker indicating deferred work

entities.name: Deferred work
entities.context: Work postponed and marked with TODO comments

entities.name: Escalation
entities.context: Process of raising issues for confirmation before proceeding

relationships.context: Enabled flag triggers escalation for confirmation
Excessive debug statements (>20) may indicate logging strategy issue
Unused variables in signatures indicate interface issues
TODO comments mark code as deferred work requiring escalation
